faithful_note: Kernel faithful: isolated step-edge K=Amount/sigma EXACTLY 6.10 at amt 100/200/300 (headless fit 6.11/6.12/6.08); engine round()-clamp Gaussian matches headless 47-48 dB in isolation. Angle=radians + Mix=blend verified. Embedded-sweep DIVERGED (26.3, amount=300 in Blurs__Directional) is transition-context compositing (animated/faded content + drop-zone boundaries), NOT blur math.
